title: lantana ramboi
intro: Lantana ramboi, also known as Lantana camara var. ramboi, is a variety of the Lantana camara plant, a flowering shrub native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The Lantana ramboi plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lantana ramboi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Lantana ramboi include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
